items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 46:1
items.html: After the revelation of phase four in the desire, which is the Gadlut [greatness/adulthood] of the will to receive. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 50)
